script_text: Fact books are full of real information.
Great readers ask questions and find the answers in the words.
Let us learn to be fact finders!
Fact finders ask five big questions.
Penguins live in very cold places. They cannot fly, but they are great swimmers.
Where do penguins live? Very cold places!
Can penguins fly? No. But they swim great!
If you are not sure, look back at the words. The answer is hiding there.
Now you are ready to answer fact questions!
